arcs.title: Northeast by Nightfall
arcs.summary: Day 2: The name was spoken aloud by Christine, found in a pencilled marginal notation on the reverse of the Hempworth chart, in a hand that may be Steve's. Steve confirmed it was the name he had in mind. One brass duck has shifted a quarter-turn toward the shelf centre. The Jeep has not moved. No departure date. Day 3 should bring the first material planning step — either the chart is unfolded properly, a route is traced, or the brass ducks complete their turn and something is decided.
